headings.description: Used for all main headings (H1-H3). Must be tight tracking.

body.description: Used for all standard text, metrics, data tables, and forms.

mono.description: Used for invoice numbers, receipt IDs, and raw data.

layout_and_spacing.gap_system: gap-4 or gap-6 for tight data density
layout_and_spacing.card_structure: Flat backgrounds (bg-white or bg-gray-50), 1px solid border (border-border), no shadow by default. Sharp or max 8px (rounded-md) border radius.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-border hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#EF4444] text-white hover:bg-[#EF4444]/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.metric_card: p-6 border border-border rounded-md flex flex-col gap-2 bg-white
cards.chart_card: p-6 border border-border rounded-md flex flex-col gap-4 bg-white col-span-2 lg:col-span-3

inputs.default: border border-border rounded-md bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-border bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl
navigation.sidebar_or_tabs: Use horizontal segmented controls or a minimal vertical sidebar for navigation.

charts.style: Minimalist axes, solid fills with no gradients, tooltips should have sharp borders and solid backgrounds.

icons.style: Clean, stroke-based, minimal. Use standard sizes (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for metric cards).

interactions.hover: Background color shifts on buttons/rows, slight border darkening. NO aggressive scaling or large shadows.
interactions.focus: High contrast ring (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]) on all interactive elements.
interactions.transitions: Use short duration (duration-200) ease-in-out for color and border changes.

images.description: Use as a placeholder for the college logo in the header or login screen.
Use for the user profile avatar in the navigation bar.
Optional background for the Applicant portal login or brochure landing page. Use heavy white overlay (bg-white/80) if text is placed on top.

accessibility.test_ids: All buttons, inputs, links, and forms MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use pure white or pure black against primary accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Enforce the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' aesthetic: avoid gradients, soft shadows, and rounded pill shapes. Stick to crisp borders, sharp grids, and solid colors.
Integrate 'Cabinet Grotesk' for Headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for Body text. Set them in index.css.
The Dashboard must feature a 'Control Room' grid layout with an Academic Year filter dropdown at the top right.
Include specific visualizations for Paid vs Unpaid Bills (Pie/Donut chart) and Revenue (Bar chart).
Use standard Lucide icons for metrics (e.g., Users, Banknotes, Receipt, RefreshCw).
Apply strict test IDs to all interactive elements for automated testing.
For user pages (Applicant/Student), maintain a clean receipt view and simple Razorpay integration mock interface.
